victim_side: Bosnian Muslims from the Srebrenica enclave
inflicting_side: Bosnian Serb Army and police forces
formula_note: Low = tribunal floor; best = ICMP estimate tied to the fall; high = memorial named-victim count.
uncertainty_note: Range is strong on direct-death scale but weak on civilian/military coding. The estimate intentionally remains in the unknown-status bucket.
quality_note: Publishable as an unknown-status direct-death estimate, not as a full DR.

formula_note: Low = HRW rounded figure; best/high = IRMCT rounded figure.
uncertainty_note: This is not a valid civilian or military person-month denominator for DR; it is only the broad population present in the enclave at collapse.
quality_note: Useful only as contextual population-present evidence.
